title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Ninjacart Digital Technologies family as a Backend Developer in Dhanbad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Ninjacart Digital Technologies:
Ninjacart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
